name: Berry Banana Bread
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Prepare a 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pan with cooking spray and flour. In a mixing bowl, combine the margarine, egg whites, bananas, and berries. In another mixing bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened. Pour mixture into prepared pan. Bake for 50 minutes.
